articles.title: Louis C.K. Re-Enters the Mainstream With Caustic Netflix Special ‘Ridiculous’: TV Review - Variety
articles.description: Louis C.K.'s Netflix special 'Ridiculous', his first on the streaming service since his sexual misconduct emerged in 2017, is a caustic comeback.

articles.title: Armie Hammer's 'Citizen Vigilante' Secures Worldwide Distribution - Variety
articles.description: Quiver has taken worldwide rights, excluding U.K., German-speaking territories, South Korea and Taiwan, to Armie Hammer’s 'Citizen Vigilante.'

articles.title: Horoscope for Tuesday, 06/30/26 by Christopher Renstrom - SFGATE
articles.description: LEO (July 22 - Aug. 21): Benevolent Jupiter enters Leo for a yearlong stay! Success will finally be yours, but beware hubris.

articles.title: 'DWTS' Alums Peta Murgatroyd, Maks Chmerkovskiy Renting Out L.A. Home Amid Florida Move - TMZ
articles.description: Peta Murgatroyd and Maks Chmerkovskiy are officially turning the page on their Los Angeles chapter ... 'cause TMZ has learned they've put their family home on the rental market as they settle into their new life in Florida.

articles.title: John Cena Goes Bald for Hair Transplant Round 2 - TMZ
articles.description: John Cena's going for Round 2 against a thinning hairline ... and this time he's hoping to take home the belt. The WWE star went bald and beautiful for his next treatment and proudly posted the pic online.

articles.title: Walton Goggins "Saved My Life" On A Movie Set, Says Olivia Wilde - Deadline
articles.description: 'Cowboys & Aliens' wasn't a superhero movie, but it turns out there was a real-life superhero on set.

articles.title: Ben Waddell Leaving ‘Summer House’ After One Season - Deadline
articles.description: Ben Waddell will not be returning to Summer House for Season 11 after one season, Deadline has confirmed.

articles.title: Director Carl Rinsch Sentenced to 30 Months in Prison for Defrauding Netflix - Rolling Stone
articles.description: Filmmaker Carl Erik Rinsch was sentenced on Monday to 30 months in prison after being convicted of defrauding Netflix out of $11 million.

articles.title: 'Lilo & Stitch' actress Daveigh Chase's official cause of death released two weeks after she died at 35 - Fox News
articles.description: Daveigh Chase's died from complications due to AIDS with chronic polysubstance use as a contributing factor, according to the Los Angeles Medical Examiner's office.

articles.description: "She was also entangled with other people," the British actress tells Louis Theroux on the broadcaster's latest podcast episode. "Well, with Elon [Musk]," he responds.

articles.description: We asked Evo Champ MenaRD why he decided to switch off the character he's most known for playing in the highest stakes matches of the Street Fighter 6 tournament.
